reviews.review_description: Bare-bones gameplay, rudimentary physics and very basic graphics. There is only 1 rage room. Teleport movement only. All destructible objects e.g. bulbs are lined up neatly on storage racks. You can't even destroy the wooden crates.

developer_response.body: Hi, Yes that's demo version. In full version you will be able to choose movement method but also few room to activate your Fury Mode.

reviews.review_description: Good Game, Removed ALL My Rage

developer_response.body: Thanks,  i believe you will like full version even better.
